items.title: Good Trouble: 8 Nonfiction Books on Resistance
items.description: Don't get it twisted—we've always been resisting, and these books show how we can keep it going.

items.title: 5 of the Buzziest Books by BIPOC Authors to Read This Month
items.description: New Tayari Jones, a literary mystery that deals with trauma, a morbid coming-of-age tale, and fantastical stories with bite, and more.

items.title: 13 Terrific New Children’s Books Out in March 2026
items.description: Check out the best new children's books out in March 2026, including fabulous picture books and middle grade books.

items.title: 7 Graphic Books about Spiritual and Religious Journeys
items.description: These comics and graphic books explore issues of faith, spirituality, and religion, from personal journeys through faith to adaptations of epics.

items.title: 10 of the Best New Romance Books to Read in March
items.description: This month's new romance releases are all standalones or series starters, so you can dive right into the swoons!
